headline: Boeing Updates Capacity And Defense Progress As Shares Trade Below Targets
summary: Boeing announced a US$2.35b investment to expand its Wichita, Kansas campus, aimed at increasing production capacity. The company reported higher aircraft deliveries for May compared with prior months. The U.S. Air Force publicly backed the updated KC-46A Pegasus tanker vision system, signaling support for Boeing's defense work. Boeing (NYSE:BA) is drawing fresh attention as these operational updates arrive with the stock trading around US$219.05 and up 9.3% over the past year. Recent...
